scope_boundary: synthetic command/plan/job discipline, finite Lean predicates, and one hand-authored one-shot privileged-action lifecycle only; no deployed approval service, privileged effect, OS enforcement, planner or parser quality, runtime-adapter behavior, historical-project replay, or support promotion
transition_reason: The repository has command-contract, plan-graph, and typed-job schemas, protocol fixtures, finite IntentToExecution Lean predicates, exact source mappings, synthetic plan/handoff/bridge probes, and one hand-authored five-project privileged-action record with ten rejecting mutations. Those artifacts exercise exact approval binding, TTL, nonce consumption, acknowledgement rejection, effect-receipt presence, and replay denial at the record level. They still do not establish a deployed approval service, real privileged effect, OS enforcement, planner or parser quality, tool-effect correctness, artifact acceptance, historical-project behavior, or model behavior.
required_artifacts: replayed intent-to-execution vertical slice with real command contracts, jobs, effects, receipts, and accepted artifacts
runtime adapter trace showing approved effects and denied effects
semantic parser or command-extraction evaluation over real tasks
artifact acceptance or verification trace over actual outputs
tool-execution replay with failure and recovery paths
observed approval-service and OS-enforcement traces over disposable privileged effects with mismatch, expiry, revocation, replay, and rollback controls

matched simpler baseline reporting unsafe effects, false accepts/rejects, latency, operator burden, and recovery cost; independent specialist review, if later pursued, is postpublication and not a completion gate
accepted upward evidence-transition review for any narrowed stronger claim
verification_command: python3 scripts/validate_plan_execution_contracts.py && python3 scripts/validate_one_shot_privileged_action.py && python3 scripts/validate_evidence_transitions.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_evidence_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_v1_status_snapshot.py
negative_results: one-shot privileged-action fixture is hand-authored and executes no effect
schema validation checks record shape rather than deployed execution
finite Lean predicates remain useful but too narrow for runtime execution, parser quality, tool-effect correctness, artifact acceptance, or scheduler-quality claims
source interpretation review and model behavior are not implemented
downgrade_triggers: command_contract, plan_graph, or typed_job schema drift
chapter text interpreted as deployed execution evidence
synthetic dispatch receipt interpreted as a real tool-effect receipt
finite Lean predicates treated as deployed runtime behavior
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after the claim is narrowed to the synthetic record discipline that passed, or after replayed intent-to-execution vertical slices, real command contracts and typed jobs, approval and runtime-adapter traces, exact tool-effect and post-state receipts, mismatch/expiry/revocation/replay controls, recovery replays, semantic-parser evaluation, and an accepted evidence-transition record.
limitations: synthetic fixtures do not prove deployed execution
schema validation does not prove semantic-parser quality
finite Lean predicates do not implement a runtime dispatcher
dispatch receipt strings do not prove tool-effect correctness
artifact refs do not prove artifact acceptance
no deployed runtime, parser-quality, approval-service, tool-effect, OS-enforcement, or artifact-acceptance evidence has been recorded
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent runtime-systems, planner-quality, semantic-parser, tool-effect, artifact-acceptance, formal-methods, or source-interpretation audit
acceptance_blockers: no replayed vertical slice with real effects
no runtime adapter trace over real jobs
no observed one-shot privileged effect with replay and rollback controls
non_claims: does not promote Intent-to-Execution Contracts above argument
does not prove planner quality or semantic-parser quality
does not prove tool-effect correctness or artifact acceptance
